source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Santa checks himself for soot. The diameter of the ornament is 7.20 cm. Standard reference texts state that he is a “right jolly old elf,” so we estimate his height to be 1.6 m. How tall is the image of Santa formed by the ornament?
